properties.description-detailed: Identifies when a node sends traffic via an exit node not used in the prior 7-day baseline. First-seen exit destinations from a specific source may indicate unsanctioned egress, a compromised node pivoting, or a policy misconfiguration. Requires Tailscale Premium or Enterprise.
properties.description: Identifies when a node sends traffic via an exit node not used in the prior 7-day baseline. First-seen exit destinations from a node may indicate routing-policy drift, data exfiltration, or compromise.
properties.name: Tailscale Premium: Unexpected exit-node egress
